interface.longDescription: Operate Carl's vesta host: Jolly Roger Jukebox, concierge, nginx/Tailscale/Cloudflare 521s, media containers, backups, and AI-agent restore runbooks. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
